title.en: Sapir-Whorf: Russian Blues — Goluboy vs Siniy
title.ko: 사피어-워프: 러시아 블루 — goluboy vs siniy

subtitle.en: Russian has two basic words for blue (siniy = dark, goluboy = light); Winawer 2007 showed Russian speakers discriminate cross-category pairs faster than within-category — language tweaks perception
subtitle.ko: 러시아어는 청색에 두 기본어(siniy/goluboy); Winawer 2007이 cross-cat 식별 빠름 — 언어가 지각 조정

description.en: Hue slider crosses the siniy/goluboy boundary at ~225°. Cross-category pairs are discriminated ~10% faster by Russian speakers.
description.ko: 색조 슬라이더가 ~225° siniy/goluboy 경계 통과. 러시아 화자는 cross-cat 쌍 ~10% 빠름.
